page_content:
### 4. Dr. Jafari (The Research Connection)  
**Subject:** Medical School LOR Request & Update: Arian Moridani (Former Research Volunteer)  
Hi Dr. Jafari,  
I hope this email finds you well and that the Advanced Robotics and Manufacturing Lab continues to thrive.  
I’ve been reflecting on my **200 hours** in your lab—especially our work on the **TVIM publication** and the senior design open house. Since graduating from UNT (**Cum Laude, 3.638 GPA**), I have been pursuing an **M.S. in Computer Science (Machine Learning)** at **Georgia Tech**.  
I would be honored if you would support my candidacy with a letter of recommendation. Because **Trevor Exley** oversaw my daily contributions, I have reached out to him to provide an update as well—he is happy to share details on our **200-hour collaboration**. **The primary submission window opens in May, so a letter by May 15th would be ideal.**  
I’ve set up an **Interfolio** account for a single upload. Thank you for your continued support!  
Best regards,  
Arian Moridani  
806-340-4502  
---
